deviations.what: Breadth-probe: a minimal sap.ui.table.Table (grid table, distinct from sap.m.Table) with 3 columns + template cells over a small ABAP model. The original's full column set, the p:ColumnAIAction plugin (post-1.71) and paste handling are omitted for the probe.

structural_diff.reason: breadth/capability probe — renders the control but is not a faithful 1:1 rebuild of the full sample
